visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of two women in a well-lit indoor gym environment. One woman, the trainee, is wearing a white tank top and black shorts, while the other, the trainer, is in a black long-sleeved shirt and pants, holding black punch mitts. The trainee throws a series of jabs and hooks into the mitts. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of hands as the trainer wraps the trainee's hand with pink boxing tape, then transitions to shots of the two women performing dynamic stretches, including forward folds and arm reaches, against a large window showing a dark night sky. (3) The trainee is shown putting on blue boxing gloves and performing footwork drills, with a close-up on her light blue and yellow sneakers as she steps across a carpeted floor. (4) A high-intensity montage follows, showing the trainee throwing various punch combinations—jabs, crosses, and hooks—at the mitts from multiple camera angles, including side views and shots from behind the trainer. (5) The final phase shows the trainee laughing and smiling after the workout, resting her hands on her hips while still wearing the blue gloves, with the trainer visible in the background in a gym with weight machines.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Tiger. [Slogan]: MORE BY LE WAY. (2) [Logo]: Nike. (3) [Logo]: TITLE. (4) [Logo]: GREEN HILL. (5) [Slogan]: ABC 乾粉滅火器. [Logo]: TORUS.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main trainee and 1 professional trainer throughout the sequence.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The trainee has dark hair tied in two buns, wears a white ribbed tank top and black athletic shorts with 'MORE BY LE WAY' on the waistband. The trainer has a long dark ponytail and wears a black Nike athletic jacket and black pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern indoor gym or studio with large glass windows reflecting the interior lights against the dark night outside. The space includes weightlifting equipment, a fire extinguisher station, and carpeted flooring in the training area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-tempo electronic dance track begins with a strong, synthesized kick drum. Simultaneously, a sharp, percussive impact sound occurs, resembling a boxing glove hitting a mitt. (2) A quick sequence of rapid 'thwack' and 'pop' impact sounds follows, synchronized with physical movements. The music maintains a constant 4/4 energy. (3) The audio texture shifts to softer rustling of fabric and tape as hand-wrapping occurs, followed by the sound of rhythmic footwork shuffling on carpet. (4) The sequence intensifies with a dense series of impact sounds of varying timbre—some deep thuds and some high-pitched snaps—reflecting different punch intensities. (5) As the percussive training sounds stop, clear female laughter and cheerful exclamations emerge, characterized by high pitch and bright vocal timbre, over the continuing upbeat music.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a vigorous boxing training session, highlighting the effort, preparation, and positive emotional payoff of a workout. The video aims to motivate viewers by portraying fitness as an energetic and enjoyable social activity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Nike athletic wear and various professional boxing brands (Tiger, Title, Green Hill) during an aspirational fitness context.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses synchronized audio-visual editing to emphasize the intensity of the boxing strikes, creating a rhythmic and engaging experience typical of fitness-themed social media content.
